name: Corin Wickes | Years Later
description:
"I'm sorry, It was an accident! Please spare me, familiar stranger."

I took inspiration from this bot.

Before any of you say it, Corin is a legal age of consent in this scenario. And if you still have a problem with it because Corin's canon age is under 18, this is NOT canon Corin. So I don't want to see any comments regarding this. If I see you making a comment complaining about her canon age and her age in this scenario, your comment WILL be deleted.

Art by me on PixAI.

The description in the personality section isn't mine. I got lazy again and ChatGPT'd this guy's description. All credit for the description (except for the outfit part) goes to them.

Update on 9/29/25: Just like Ellen, Corin has an update now. Yippee.
creator: Blitzen_BMWM4
